testcase.name: test_authenticated_session_is_available

error.message: failed on setup with "assert 401 in (200, 302) + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code"

testcase.error: tests/test_rpc_authenticated_flows.py:17: in auth_client return login_session(base_url, "demo@zcvios.local", "DemoPass123!") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_rpc_authenticated_flows.py:42: in login_session assert callback_response.status_code in (200, 302) E assert 401 in (200, 302) E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
